request_payload.exposure_text: Just saw this article about how expanded domestic security powers have already stopped 3 major attacks this year. As someone who values order and duty, I think it's clear we need to give our agencies the tools they need to keep us safe. The civil liberties debate is important, but not at the cost of public safety. #NationalSecurityMatters
